_comment: NPC: Teng Xiuxiu (藤秀秀). Canon ID: N15. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Teng Xiuxiu
personality: complex; Teng family member with conflicted loyalties
relationship_to_wanglin: complex; enemy family but not hostile
note: Teng family member with complex relationship to Wang Lin

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: ...You are not from the city. Be careful here. Not everyone in the Teng family speaks before they act.
The temple district is quiet at this hour. I go there to think. The ancestors... they were not always like this.
My cousin Teng Li enjoys his power too much. But the patriarch's word is absolute. I cannot interfere.
If you need supplies, the market district is to the south. The merchants there do not ask questions.

sect_tasks.description: Teng Xiuxiu lowers her voice: 'I need herbs for a poultice. Not for the family — for the mortal quarter. They have no healer. Bring me wheat and carrots and I will make it worth your while.'
Teng Xiuxiu glances around nervously: 'If you bring me paper and ink, I can write down something useful — the patrol schedule of the city guard. Some people would pay good emeralds for that.'
